sourcesContent:
export const products = [
  { id: 1, name: 'Wireless Headphones Pro', category: 'electronics', price: 2499, originalPrice: 3999, rating: 4.5, reviews: 128, image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1505740420928-5e560c06d30e?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', badge: 'Best Seller' },
  { id: 2, name: 'Smart Watch Series 5', category: 'electronics', price: 8999, originalPrice: 12999, rating: 4.3, reviews: 89, image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1523275335684-37898b6baf30?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', badge: 'New' },
  { id: 3, name: 'Running Sneakers Ultra', category: 'fashion', price: 1799, originalPrice: 2999, rating: 4.6, reviews: 245, image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1542291026-7eec264c27ff?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', badge: 'Sale' },
  { id: 4, name: 'Minimalist Tote Bag', category: 'fashion', price: 899, originalPrice: 1499, rating: 4.2, reviews: 67, image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1548036328-c9fa89d128fa?w=300&h=300&fit=crop' },
  { id: 5, name: 'Ceramic Coffee Mug Set', category: 'home', price: 599, originalPrice: 999, rating: 4.7, reviews: 312, image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1514228742587-6b1558fcca3d?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', badge: 'Top Rated' },
  { id: 6, name: 'Succulent Plant Pack', category: 'home', price: 349, originalPrice: 599, rating: 4.4, reviews: 156, image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1459411621453-7b03977f4bfc?w=300&h=300&fit=crop' },
  { id: 7, name: 'Vitamin C Face Serum', category: 'beauty', price: 799, originalPrice: 1299, rating: 4.8, reviews: 423, image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1620916566398-39f1143ab7be?w=300&h=300&fit=crop', badge: 'Best Seller' },
  { id: 8, name: 'Yoga Mat Premium', category: 'sports', price: 1299, originalPrice: 1999, rating: 4.5, reviews: 189, image: 'https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1601925228008-47af02c5e5af?w=300&h=300&fit=crop' },
];

export const categories = [
  { name: 'Electronics', icon: '💻', count: 248, color: '#6366f1', bg: '#eef2ff' },
  { name: 'Fashion', icon: '👗', count: 512, color: '#ec4899', bg: '#fdf2f8' },
